###############################################################################
# arm_compat_generated_tiers.txt
# Generated by Tools/build_builtin_compat_profiles.py
###############################################################################

arm_assign_power_tier_blackice = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 26 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 53 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 100 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 170 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 305 (300+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 245 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 295 (300-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 235 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 160 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 90 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 43 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 16 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        # Superpowers stay near the frontier, but should not be universally perfect.
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 2.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_ARCADE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.75 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = arm_old_tier_index compare = equals } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_cold_war_iron_curtain = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 45 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 95 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 185 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 315 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 305 (300+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 455 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 295 (300-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 445 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 305 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 175 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 85 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 35 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        # Superpowers stay near the frontier, but should not be universally perfect.
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 2.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_ARCADE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.75 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = arm_old_tier_index compare = equals } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_kaiserreich = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 27 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 55 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 105 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 175 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 305 (300+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 255 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 295 (300-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 245 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 165 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 95 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 45 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 17 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        # Superpowers stay near the frontier, but should not be universally perfect.
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 2.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_ARCADE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.75 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = arm_old_tier_index compare = equals } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_endsieg = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 25 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 50 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 95 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 155 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 305 (300+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 225 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 295 (300-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 215 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 145 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 85 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 40 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 15 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        # Superpowers stay near the frontier, but should not be universally perfect.
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 2.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_ARCADE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.75 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = arm_old_tier_index compare = equals } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 25 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 50 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 95 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 155 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 305 (300+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 225 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 295 (300-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 215 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 145 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 85 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 40 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 15 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        # Superpowers stay near the frontier, but should not be universally perfect.
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 2.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_ARCADE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.75 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = arm_old_tier_index compare = equals } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_novum_vexillum = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 38 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 80 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 155 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 265 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 305 (300+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 385 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 295 (300-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 375 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 255 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 145 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 70 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 28 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        # Superpowers stay near the frontier, but should not be universally perfect.
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 2.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_ARCADE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.75 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = arm_old_tier_index compare = equals } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_rise_of_nations = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 40 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 85 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 165 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 285 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 305 (300+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 405 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 295 (300-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 395 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 275 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 155 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 75 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 30 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        # Superpowers stay near the frontier, but should not be universally perfect.
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 2.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_ARCADE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.75 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = arm_old_tier_index compare = equals } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_kaiserredux = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 27 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 55 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 107 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 180 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 305 (300+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 260 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 295 (300-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 250 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 170 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 97 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 45 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 17 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        # Superpowers stay near the frontier, but should not be universally perfect.
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 2.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_REALISTIC }
                has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_HISTORICAL }
            }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_ARCADE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.75 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = arm_old_tier_index compare = equals } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_the_new_order = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 30 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 65 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 125 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 210 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 305 (300+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 305 compare = greater_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 295 (300-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 295 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 200 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 115 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 55 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 0 compare = greater_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_global_power value = 20 compare = less_than }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        # Superpowers stay near the frontier, but should not be universally perfect.
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 2.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = equals } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = equals } }
